author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iter 9: 2 Tier-3 docs (net pivot cont'd).

net/struct-sock.md (242 lines, 15 REQ / 12 AC, 0 open) — protocol-agnostic struct sock + sock_common + sock subclasses (inet_sock + inet_connection_sock) + sock_lock semantics + per-sock memory accounting + cgroup integration + sk_filter + SCM helpers. Layout-equivalence for first-cache-line so existing protocol modules work unchanged.

net/ipv4/tcp.md (316 lines, 17 REQ / 14 AC, 0 open) — TCP transmission control protocol full surface: state machine (RFC 9293), 17 pluggable cong-control algorithms (CUBIC/BBR/Reno/DCTCP/...), RACK+TLP loss recovery, F-RTO, SACK+DSACK, RTT/RTO estimation, TCP Fast Open (RFC 7413), TCP Authentication Option (RFC 5925), TCP-MD5 (RFC 2385), GSO+GRO offload, sockmap BPF integration, per-route metrics caching. **Layer-4 Verus proof of TCP state-machine RFC 9293 conformance is the keystone proof for net** (declared mandatory-recommended in net/00-overview.md). TLA+ model models/net/tcp_state.tla owned here (mandatory L2).

Total .design/ docs: 57.
